mano_cua.result_summary: 与 BongoCat-499 相同问题。Tauri 桌面应用深度依赖 @tauri-apps/api（webviewWindow、plugin-log、plugin-opener 等），纯浏览器环境下 window.__TAURI__ 不存在导致 TypeError，Vue 应用无法渲染。已通过 499 验证确认，509 代码同样依赖 Tauri API，跳过 mano-cua。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Same Tauri dependency issue as BongoCat-499. Source code imports from @tauri-apps/api extensively. Browser-only vite dev server cannot provide Tauri runtime.
